name: -V
--version
options.description: Show version and exit

name: -h
--help
options.description: Show help message and exit

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Give more output

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Give less output

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install packages

name: -r
--requirement
options.description: Install from the given requirements file

name: -e
--editable
options.description: Install a project in editable mode

name: -U
--upgrade
options.description: Upgrade all specified packages to the newest available version

options.name: --no-deps
options.description: Do not install package dependencies

options.name: --pre
options.description: Include pre-release and development versions

options.name: --user
options.description: Install to the Python user install directory

options.name: --force-reinstall
options.description: Reinstall all packages even if they are already up-to-date

name: -t
--target
options.description: Install packages into target directory

options.name: --no-cache-dir
options.description: Disable the cache

name: -i
--index-url
options.description: Base URL of the Python Package Index

options.name: --extra-index-url
options.description: Extra URLs of package indexes

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Uninstall packages

name: -r
--requirement
options.description: Uninstall packages listed in the given requirements file

name: -y
--yes
options.description: Do not ask for confirmation of uninstall deletions

subcommands.name: freeze
subcommands.description: Output installed packages in requirements format

name: -r
--requirement
options.description: Use the order of a given requirements file

name: -l
--local
options.description: Only output packages installed in the local virtualenv

options.name: --user
options.description: Only output packages installed in user-site

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude specified package from the output

options.name: --exclude-editable
options.description: Exclude editable packages from output

subcommands.description: List installed packages

name: -o
--outdated
options.description: List outdated packages

name: -u
--uptodate
options.description: List uptodate packages

name: -e
--editable
options.description: List editable projects

name: -l
--local
options.description: Only output packages installed in the local virtualenv

options.name: --user
options.description: Only output packages installed in user-site

options.name: --format
options.description: Select the output format

options.name: --not-required
options.description: List packages that are not dependencies of installed packages

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show information about installed packages

name: -f
--files
options.description: Show the full list of installed files for each package

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.description: Search PyPI for packages

subcommands.name: download
subcommands.description: Download packages

--dest
options.description: Download packages into the specified directory

--requirement
options.description: Install from the given requirements file

options.name: --no-deps
options.description: Do not install package dependencies

options.name: --no-binary
options.description: Do not use binary packages

--wheel-dir
options.description: Build wheels into the specified directory

--requirement
options.description: Install from the given requirements file

options.name: --no-deps
options.description: Do not install package dependencies

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Verify installed packages have compatible dependencies

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Manage local and global configuration

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List the active configuration

subcommands.name: edit
subcommands.description: Edit the configuration file in an editor

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Get the value associated with a configuration key

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set the value associated with a configuration key

subcommands.name: unset
subcommands.description: Unset the value associated with a configuration key

subcommands.name: debug
subcommands.description: List the configuration files and values defined under them

subcommands.name: cache
subcommands.description: Inspect and manage pip's wheel cache

subcommands.name: dir
subcommands.description: Show the cache directory

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Show information about the cache

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List filenames of packages stored in the cache

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove one or more packages from the cache

subcommands.name: purge
subcommands.description: Remove all items from the cache
